settings.subtitle: GIVE THE GIFT OF GOOD SKIN
settings.description:
Spread the love this Valentine's Day with Yoé. Purchase a full-size Yoé product, and we’ll gift a second one to your loved one—our treat. You choose the person, we’ll take care of the rest.

REDEEM WITH: YOELOVE2025

settings.product_description: Ympossible Cream is formulated to restore skin, ease hyperpigmentation, and instantly hydrate while fortifying the skin’s moisture barrier. The cream addresses signs of aging, resulting in a visibly rejuvenated, youthful complexion. Powered by the revolutionary SynerGenius™ complex, which utilizes an advanced encapsulation technology to deliver gentle yet potent actives into the skin.

Ympossible Cream Light is a skin-supportive moisturizer that imparts a dewy finish. The cream provides long-lasting hydration and addresses visible signs of aging, while replenishing the skin’s moisture barrier. Powered by the revolutionary SynerGenius™ complex, which utilizes an advanced encapsulation technology to deliver gentle yet potent actives into the skin.

settings.heading: TWO MULTI-ACTION HERO CREAMS, TWO OPTIONS TO ACHIEVE ULTIMATE RESULTS.

settings.source: STAR FACIALIST EDYTA AROSZ SHARES HER TOP SKINCARE PICKS FOR TRAVEL
settings.mention_text: “With its lightweight, fast-absorbing texture, it's perfect for quick applications, delivering a dewy finish without any heaviness.”

settings.source: 79 TOP FALL 2024 SKINCARELAUNCHES FOR EVERY SKIN TYPE
settings.mention_text: “In just a short time, this moisturizer has become a go-to for some of the biggest makeup artists thanks to its beautiful wear under makeup.”

settings.source: OUR BEAUTY DIRECTOR'S GUIDE TO THE NEW YORK BRANDS THAT REALLY WORK
settings.mention_text: “The make-up artist Hung Vanngo, who has painted the faces of Jennifer Lopez, Selena Gomez and Claudia Schiffer, used them for a year”.

settings.heading: YMPOSSIBLE CREAM WAS JUST AWARDED OPRAH DAILY BEAUTY O-WARD’S BEST NIGHT CREAM OF 2024
settings.award_text: "It’s so hard to find a rich, luxurious anti-aging cream for sensitive skin—but this is it!"

settings.caption: Science-Backed Innovation
settings.heading: SynerGenius™
settings.text: It all starts with our SynerGenius™ complex, a proprietary blend of botanical and bioengineered actives that work synergistically to deeply hydrate, repair and visibly revitalize skin.

settings.caption: Delivery System
settings.heading: Advanced Encapsulation
settings.text: Powered by an advanced encapsulation delivery system, Yoé actives are gradually and precisely released into the skin to reach its deepest layers, ensuring long-lasting results.

settings.heading: Everyone Loves Yoé

settings.heading: How will my Valentine receive the products?
settings.row_content: • Your Valentine will receive an email containing a voucher to redeem their complimentary product, with your name included to let them know the gift is from you. We make it super easy!

settings.heading: What are the differences between Yoé’s two hero products?
settings.row_content:
• Ympossible Cream: A rich, ultra-nourishing formula designed to deeply hydrate, rejuvenate and protect your skin.  
  • Ympossible Cream Light: A lightweight version of our multi-action cream that delivers hydration, radiance and a youthful glow.

settings.heading: What are the benefits of the Ympossible Cream?
settings.row_content:
• Instantly hydrates and replenishes the skin.  
  • Provides deep, long-lasting nourishment.  
  • Strengthens the skin's moisture barrier.  
  • Targets visible signs of aging for a youthful complexion.  
  • Boosts collagen production for firmer, healthier skin.  
  • Improves skin tone and texture while addressing hyperpigmentation.  
  • Protects against environmental damage from pollution, UV and blue light.

settings.heading: What are the benefits of the Ympossible Cream Light?
settings.row_content:
• Supplies instant and long-lasting hydration.  
  • Delivers a radiant, luminous glow.  
  • Strengthens the moisture barrier for lasting hydration.  
  • Smooths texture and plumps skin for a youthful look.  
  • Reduces fine lines, wrinkles, and redness.  
  • Protects against environmental damage from pollution, UV, and blue light.

settings.heading: How do I use the Ympossible Cream and Ympossible Cream Light?
settings.row_content:
• Ympossible Cream: Apply to cleansed, dry skin on the face, neck and décolletage, both morning and evening. It can also be used as an overnight mask for stressed or parched skin. Best for normal to dry skin types or as a rich nighttime treatment.  
  • Ympossible Cream Light: Apply to cleansed, dry skin on the face, neck, and décolletage, both morning and evening. Ideal for normal to oily and combination skin types, or as a makeup base for a glowy finish.

Both products can also be used together as a moisture cocktail to tailor hydration to your skin's specific needs. Mix them in your palm to balance nourishment and radiance, addressing multiple skin concerns at once.

settings.heading: Are these products suitable for sensitive skin or those who are pregnant or breastfeeding?
settings.row_content:
Yes! Both the Ympossible Cream and Ympossible Cream Light are:  

  • Dermatologist-tested and hypoallergenic.  
  • Safe for all skin types, including sensitive skin.  
  • Suitable for individuals who are pregnant or breastfeeding.

settings.heading: Are these products clean and safe?
settings.row_content:
Absolutely. Yoé’s products are: 

  • Clinically and dermatologically tested.  
  • Hypoallergenic and safe for pregnant or breastfeeding individuals.  
  • Formulated without parabens, phthalates, synthetic fragrances and other harmful substances.  
  • EWG verified, Leaping Bunny Certified and vegan.

settings.heading: Are these products vegan and cruelty-free?
settings.row_content: • Yes, both products are 100% vegan and cruelty-free, and they are Leaping Bunny certified.
